data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tracking bookings by source.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement to track bookings by source (Instagram vs Facebook vs website). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for tracking bookings by source, but there is no direct evidence of its implementation or verification in the prior steps.
gaps: No evidence of tracking bookings by source (Instagram vs Facebook vs website).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the tracking of bookings by source.
